title: The Heart Unseen
content:
So many times the heart can break,
        So many ways,
    Yet beat along and beat along
        So many days.

    A fluttering thing we never see,
        And only hear
    When some stern doctor to our side
        Presses his ear.

    Strange hidden thing, that beats and beats
        We know not why,
    And makes us live, though we indeed
        Would rather die.

    Mysterious, fighting, loving thing,
        So sad, so true - 
    I would my laughing eyes some day
        Might look on you.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Le Gallienne delivers a powerful performance in "The Heart Unseen"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
